# WASM Binding — @modern_colorthief/wasm

Install: `npm install @modern_colorthief/wasm`

## API

```javascript
import { getPalette, getColor } from '@modern_colorthief/wasm';

const palette = await getPalette(image, colorCount?, quality?);  // number[][]
const color = await getColor(image, quality?);                   // number[]
```

## Parameters

- `image`: `string | ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array` — URL, ArrayBuffer, or Uint8Array
- `colorCount`: `number` — colors to extract (default: 10)
- `quality`: `number` — sampling quality 1-10 (default: 10)

## Image Decoding

Uses browser Canvas API. WebGPU planned for GPU acceleration.
